title: Campo Grande, MS — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Campo Grande, MS: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Campo Grande is a city in MS with a population of 916,001. Mato Grosso do Sul’s capital, a modern city with wide boulevards, strong gaúcho traditions, and access to the Pantanal and Bonito.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
